zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy I de Blois-Châtillon於大約1298年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯a利-素-馬內時，他的父親Hugues de Châtillon II41歲，母親Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre40歲。他於1311年與Marguerite de Valois在法國瑟-吉瓦沙吉格曼--萊也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年8月12日在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年45歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易-吉黑-素-瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy I de Blois-Châtillon于大约1298年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯a利-素-馬內时，他的父亲Hugues de Châtillon II41岁，母亲Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre40岁。他于1311年与Marguerite de Valois在法国瑟-吉瓦沙吉格曼--萊也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1342年8月12日在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年45岁，埋葬在法国崔洛易-吉黑-素-瑟。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy I de Blois-Châtillon was born about 1298, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Hugues de Châtillon II, was 41 and his mother, Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, was 40. He married Marguerite de Valois in 1311, in Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 August 1342, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, at the age of 45, and was buried in Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy I de Blois-Châtillon est né environ 1298, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Hugues de Châtillon II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Valois en 1311, à Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1342, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy I de Blois-Châtillon um 1298 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Châtillon II 41 und seine Mutter Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre 40. Er hat 1311 in Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich Marguerite de Valois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1342 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich und wurde in Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy I de Blois-Châtillon è nato il circa 1298 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Châtillon II, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Valois nel 1311, nel Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1342, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy I de Blois-Châtillonが約1298年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Hugues de Châtillon IIは41歳，母Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandreは40歳であった。1311年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼサイント-ジャーメイン-エン-レイでMarguerite de Valoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1342年8月12日にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで45歳で死去し，フランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーチオウズイ-スル-シッセにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy I de Blois-Châtillon(이)가 대략 1298년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Châtillon II(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1311년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 세인트-그맹--레이에서 Marguerite de Valois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 8월 12일 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 초우즈이-수-시스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy I de Blois-Châtillon nasceu aproximadamente 1298, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Hugues de Châtillon II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Valois em 1311, em Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1342, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy I de Blois-Châtillon родился около 1298 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Châtillon II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Valois в 1311 г. в местности сеинт-гирмеин-ен-леи, сине-ет-оис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1342 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности чоузи-сур-сисс, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция.

sm.between 1307 and 1342: mai le 1307 e o'o I le 1342

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy I de Blois-Châtillon nació aproximadamente 1298, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Châtillon II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Béatrix I de Dampierre-Flandre, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Valois en 1311, en Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1342, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Chouzy-sur-Cisse, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.
